title: MCA Jobs 2026 – Young Professional
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University Recruitment 2026 notification out for 1 Young Professional (Mathematical Modeling) post. Candidates with Ph.D/M.Tech/M.Sc/MCA qualifications in relevant fields can apply through email mode on or before 10 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University Recruitment 2026 notification out for 1 Young Professional (Mathematical Modeling) post. Candidates with Ph.D/M.Tech/M.Sc/MCA qualifications in relevant fields can apply through email mode on or before 10 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.details: Ph.D in the field of Geoinformatics, Water Resource, Environment, Geography or equivalent. M. Tech in Geoinformatics, Water Resource, Environment or equivalent. M. Sc in Geoinformatics, Geography, Environment or equivalent. MCA with at least one year experience in relevant field.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10 June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a Ph.D. in Geoinformatics, Water Resource, Environment, Geography or equivalent, or an M.Tech/M.Sc in relevant fields, or an MCA with at least one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional post is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: How can I apply for the IIT BHU Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Young Professional (Mathematical Modeling) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IIT(BHU)/CE/NMCG/DSS/26-27/08.

faq.question: Where is IIT BHU located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.
